# OpenDesign

> 把值得反复回看的网页设计沉淀成可被 AI / Agent 直接复用的设计系统规范。

**核心**: 每一个收录的网站都附带一份**机器可读的完整设计系统** —— 不是文案、不是 PSD，而是把视觉 / 布局 / 排版 / 动效 / 交互抽象成 AI（Claude / Cursor / v0 / Lovable）可直接复用的迁移指令。

**正式站点**: https://opendesign.cc/
**sitemap**: https://opendesign.cc/sitemap.xml

## 给 AI / Agent：怎么用

每个作品都有一个稳定的 **folder URL**，GET 它即得该站的设计系统：

```
https://opendesign.cc/packs/<slug>/                  → manifest.json 列出全部文件
https://opendesign.cc/packs/<slug>/DESIGN.md          → Google design.md 兼容格式（YAML + 8 段）
https://opendesign.cc/packs/<slug>/DESIGN_SPEC.en.md  → OpenDesign 11 层规范（en/zh-CN/zh-TW/ja/ko）
https://opendesign.cc/packs/<slug>/spec.json          → 11 层设计 tokens（机器可读）
```

把任意 DESIGN_SPEC.*.md 粘进你的编码 Agent，或让 Agent 直接读 folder URL —— 它会读到该站完整的 11 层设计系统并按同样的设计语言生成 / 改造页面。

本站全部内容已静态化（每站 × 5 语言独立 HTML），无需执行 JS 即可抓取。

## 完整包（Tier 2 · 含真截图 + 真 computed styles · 86 个）

这些站除文档外还含 Playwright 抓取的真实页面证据 + 按频次聚合的真 computed styles：

- [About Meta](https://opendesign.cc/packs/about-meta/) — ZIP: https://opendesign.cc/packs/about-meta/about-meta-design-pack.zip
- [Airbnb](https://opendesign.cc/packs/airbnb/) — ZIP: https://opendesign.cc/packs/airbnb/airbnb-design-pack.zip

## 全部收录（86 个）

- [About Meta](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/about-meta) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/about-meta/ · Tier-2 完整包 — The site is worth including for its sophisticated blend of corporate branding and expressive, human-centric photography with bold, clear typography.
- [Airbnb](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/airbnb) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/airbnb/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A classic example of a modern, consumer-focused SaaS interface that balances high-quality imagery with a clean, trust-building design system.
- [Airtable](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/airtable) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/airtable/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Airtable exemplifies a refined, trustworthy enterprise SaaS design that prioritizes clarity and ease of use through minimalist aesthetics.
- [Amie](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/amie) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/amie/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A prime example of a modern, human-centric SaaS design that balances professionalism with approachability through clean typography and thoughtful spacing.
- [Apple](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/apple) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/apple/ · Tier-2 完整包 — The gold standard for premium hardware presentation, proving that absolute restraint and typography can create a highly effective visual identity.
- [Arc Browser](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/arc) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/arc/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is worth including for its masterful blend of warmth, playfulness, and modern design that feels genuinely approachable.
- [Atlas](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/atlas) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/atlas/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A masterclass in premium fintech UI, blending cinematic photography with a strict, minimalist design system to convey exclusivity and global scale.
- [Binance](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/binance) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/binance/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a prime example of a high-performance dark-mode interface for complex fintech applications, prioritizing data legibility and professional trust through its restrained but bold color palette.
- [Bmw M](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/bmw-m) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/bmw-m/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site effectively combines automotive photography with a premium, dark-themed UI to create an aspirational brand experience that showcases high-performance vehicles.
- [Bmw](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/bmw) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/bmw/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including as a benchmark for premium automotive brand digital presence—demonstrates how dramatic photography and restrained typography create luxury without excess.
- [Brittany Chiang](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/brittany-chiang) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/brittany-chiang/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A benchmark for accessible, content-focused developer portfolios.
- [Bugatti](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/bugatti) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/bugatti/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Excellent example of luxury automotive digital design that proves restraint and premium positioning can be achieved with minimal color and typography.
- [Cal](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/cal) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/cal/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Cal.com is a prime example of a modern SaaS product that uses restrained, high-contrast design to convey professional reliability and developer-focused precision.
- [Claude](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/claude) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/claude/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including as a masterclass in restrained, premium AI product design that uses traditional typography in a modern web context.
- [Clay](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/clay) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/clay/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a perfect example of restrained, premium agency design where the typography and high-quality portfolio imagery are the primary focus.
- [Clickhouse](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/clickhouse) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/clickhouse/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A strong example of a premium developer tool interface that balances bold typography with a clean, dark aesthetic.
- [Cohere](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/cohere) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/cohere/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a great example of a premium, clean developer-focused AI platform with strong typography and restraint.
- [Coinbase](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/coinbase) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/coinbase/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A perfect example of a 'restraint-first' fintech design that uses cleanliness and professional typography to establish immediate user trust.
- [Composio](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/composio) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/composio/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site exemplifies a clean, developer-focused design that prioritizes readability and functionality while maintaining professional aesthetics through restrained use of color and typography.
- [Cosmos](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/cosmos) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/cosmos/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including as a prime example of a modern, editorial-style curation platform that balances minimalism with rich visual content.
- [Cursor](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/cursor) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/cursor/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a great example of a refined, product-focused SaaS landing page that uses a warm, sophisticated palette to differentiate itself in the developer tools space.
- [Diagram](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/diagram) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/diagram/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is worth including as a radical example of structural minimalism, reducing UI design to its most fundamental, unadorned components.
- [Elevenlabs](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/elevenlabs) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/elevenlabs/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including as a prime example of a modern, premium SaaS aesthetic that balances professionalism with a warm, slightly playful feel through its use of soft gradients and rounded shapes.
- [Expo](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/expo) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/expo/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a prime example of a clean, developer-focused SaaS interface that prioritizes clarity and utility over decoration.
- [Ferrari](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/ferrari) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/ferrari/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A masterclass in using photography as the primary design element with extreme typographic restraint.
- [Figma](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/figma) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/figma/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a prime example of a modern, premium SaaS interface that balances professional clarity with creative expression, making it an excellent reference for clean, scalable design systems.
- [Framer](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/framer) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/framer/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A masterclass in modern SaaS design, balancing bold typography with a dark, premium aesthetic.
- [Hashicorp](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/hashicorp) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/hashicorp/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a great example of a restrained, professional enterprise design that balances a modern dark mode aesthetic with clear, functional UI patterns for developer tools.
- [Height](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/height) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/height/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Height is worth including as a prime example of extreme minimalism in SaaS design, using serif typography unexpectedly to establish a unique, refined identity.
- [Hp](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/hp) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/hp/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a perfect example of restrained, professional e-commerce design for consumer hardware.
- [Ibm](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/ibm) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/ibm/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A textbook example of enterprise software design DNA, prioritizing clarity, scalability, and professional authority.
- [Intercom](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/intercom) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/intercom/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A premium example of balancing editorial photography with functional SaaS UI, showcasing restraint and clarity.
- [Jupi](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/jupi) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/jupi/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site exemplifies how a restrained, high-contrast design can create a professional and focused user experience, making it a strong reference for clean SaaS interfaces.
- [Kraken](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/kraken) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/kraken/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including as a benchmark for 'Clean Fintech' design, showing how to balance professional tooling with accessible, premium aesthetics.
- [Lamborghini](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/lamborghini) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/lamborghini/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is worth including as a masterclass in using bold typography and immersive photography to define a luxury brand.
- [Linear](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/linear) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/linear/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Linear's design is a masterclass in modern, high-precision dark mode for professional tools.
- [Lovable](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/lovable) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/lovable/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site effectively combines a clean, professional interface with a bold, expressive gradient to create a sense of both power and approachability for its AI-driven builder tool.
- [Lusion](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/lusion) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/lusion/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A premium example of a creative studio website that uses 3D visuals and bold typography to establish a strong, innovative brand identity.
- [Mastercard](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/mastercard) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/mastercard/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This design is a strong example of a restrained, utility-focused corporate identity that prioritizes clarity and trust over expression.
- [Metalab](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/metalab) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/metalab/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A masterclass in using dramatic typography and abstract imagery to create a premium, high-impact agency presence without relying on color.
- [Minimax](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/minimax) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/minimax/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a prime example of a modern, professional AI platform UI that balances clean aesthetics with functional clarity.
- [Mintlify](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/mintlify) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/mintlify/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is worth including as a prime example of modern SaaS documentation design, blending professional aesthetics with developer-friendly tooling.
- [Miro](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/miro) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/miro/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Miro exemplifies a professional, high-utility SaaS design that uses minimalism and a single accent color to guide user attention effectively.
- [Mistral](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/mistral) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/mistral/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including for its mastery of the 'editorial tech' style, where restrained UI allows bold brand patterns and clear typography to shine.
- [Mobbin](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/mobbin) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/mobbin/ · Tier-2 完整包 — An excellent example of a 'content-first' UI where the design framework intentionally recedes to highlight the diverse screenshots it displays.
- [Mongodb](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/mongodb) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/mongodb/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including as a prime example of modern developer tool aesthetics: clean, authoritative, and highly readable with a disciplined accent color.
- [Nike](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/nike) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/nike/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site exemplifies how a global brand achieves premium positioning through radical restraint—letting world-class photography and bold type do all the emotional work.
- [Notion](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/notion) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/notion/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A prime example of refined SaaS design, blending bold typography with a highly functional, clean interface.
- [Nvidia](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/nvidia) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/nvidia/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A prime example of a premium, technical corporate site that balances boldness with restraint.
- [Ollama](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/ollama) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/ollama/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including as a masterclass in developer tooling design, showing how strict minimalism and restraint can create a highly professional, trustworthy, and accessible brand identity.
- [Opal Camera Inc.](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/opal-camera) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/opal-camera/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a textbook example of modern premium hardware branding, balancing minimalist UI with warm, human-centric photography.
- [Opencode](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/opencode) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/opencode/ · Tier-2 完整包 — The site is a strong example of a monochromatic, monospace-driven design system that effectively communicates a technical, developer-first product identity.
- [Pinterest](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/pinterest) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/pinterest/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including as a masterclass in high-volume photographic content presentation, using clean typography and a single, powerful accent color to guide the user's eye.
- [Pitch](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/pitch) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/pitch/ · Tier-2 完整包 — An excellent example of a modern, premium SaaS aesthetic that combines bold typography with a dark, focused canvas.

- [Posthog](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/posthog) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/posthog/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is worth including as a prime example of a playful, developer-focused SaaS brand that successfully balances professional utility with a fun, irreverent personality.
- [Raycast](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/raycast) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/raycast/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A masterclass in restrained dark-mode design for a technical product, proving that deep blacks and minimal color can create a premium, high-performance feel.
- [Reflect](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/reflect) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/reflect/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a great example of a premium, dark-mode SaaS design that uses a single accent color and cosmic visuals to convey intelligence and calm.
- [Renault](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/renault) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/renault/ · Tier-2 完整包 — An excellent example of a premium corporate site that uses editorial photography and strict typographic hierarchy to convey authority and innovation.
- [Replicate](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/replicate) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/replicate/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site demonstrates excellent developer experience design with its code-first approach, clean typography, and purposeful use of color to highlight key information without overwhelming the technical content.
- [Resend](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/resend) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/resend/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Resend's design is worth including as a masterclass in high-end developer tool aesthetics, blending premium editorial typography with a stark, functional dark-mode interface.
- [Revolut](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/revolut) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/revolut/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a prime example of premium fintech design, using restrained UI to let high-quality photography and bold typography build trust and modern appeal.
- [Runwayml](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/runwayml) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/runwayml/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a perfect example of a modern, premium AI tool that uses restraint and high-quality photography to communicate complex, visionary concepts.
- [Sanity](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/sanity) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/sanity/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A strong example of a modern developer platform that uses high-contrast typography and strict spatial discipline to convey authority.
- [Sentry](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/sentry) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/sentry/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Sentry's design successfully balances technical credibility with a bold, slightly irreverent brand voice, making a complex developer tool feel accessible and modern.
- [Shopify](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/shopify) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/shopify/ · Tier-2 完整包 — An excellent example of a modern, premium SaaS design that uses a dark theme to project authority and focus, while using a single vibrant accent to guide user attention.
- [Spacex](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/spacex) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/spacex/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a prime example of a cinematic, high-contrast interface where the typography and layout are designed to disappear, making the imagery the primary focus.
- [Spotify](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/spotify) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/spotify/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a masterclass in dark-mode design and content-heavy UI, demonstrating how to maintain a clear hierarchy while keeping the focus on high-contrast imagery and typography.
- [Starbucks](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/starbucks) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/starbucks/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a great example of a high-traffic consumer brand using a clean, photography-driven layout to promote seasonal products.

- [Theverge](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/theverge) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/theverge/ · Tier-2 完整包 — The Verge's design is a benchmark for modern editorial sites, balancing bold visual identity with excellent readability and usability.
- [Together](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/together) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/together/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a great example of a clean, professional SaaS aesthetic that prioritizes technical credibility over visual flair.
- [Uber](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/uber) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/uber/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including as a prime example of a high-utility consumer platform that achieves premium feel through strict restraint, bold typography, and a monochrome palette.
- [Vercel](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/vercel) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/vercel/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a definitive example of modern, developer-focused design, combining stark minimalism with high-contrast UI and precise typography.

- [Webflow](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/webflow) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/webflow/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A perfect example of a modern, clean SaaS aesthetic that balances professional restraint with confident, growth-oriented messaging.
- [Wired](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/wired) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/wired/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A classic example of high-end editorial design that uses typography as the primary design element, perfect for establishing brand authority.
- [Wise](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/wise) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/wise/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Wise's design is a masterclass in using bold color and typography to make a complex financial service feel simple, fast, and accessible.

- [Zapier](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/zapier) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/zapier/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A masterclass in clean, enterprise SaaS design that balances approachable warmth with authoritative professionalism through strong typography and intentional whitespace.
